name: Easy Harness AI Attachment Intake Test Pack v1

cases.message: I need a short custom harness for a Deutsch DT06-6S connector. Use the attached connector image, PDF note, CSV pinout, XLSX table, and CAD reference files. Target length is about 450 mm. This will be used on a 12V automotive sensor branch. Please organize what I gave you into an Easy Harness Draft and ask me only for missing information.
The pin mapping is in my spreadsheet and CSV. Please use those files as the source of truth. Connector A is DT06-6S. I am not sure about wire colors for pins 5 and 6.
I uploaded CAD-style reference files for the connector shell, bracket outline, and protective boot. Please use them as dimensional/context references, not final manufacturing drawings.
